name: Mark of Passage Spells
summary: If your human character has the Mark of Sentinel, the following traits replace the human's Ability Score Increase trait found in the Player's Handbook

traits.name: Sentinel's Intuition
traits.summary: Whenever you make an Wisdom (Insight) or a Wisdom (Perception) check, you can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to the total ability check.

traits.name: Guardian's Shield
traits.summary: You can cast theShieldspell with this trait. Once you cast this spell with this trait, you can't cast that spell again until you finish a Long Rest. Wisdom is your Spellcasting Ability for these spells.

traits.name: Spells of the Mark
traits.summary: If you have the Spellcasting or Pact Magic class feature, the spells on the Mark of Sentinel Spells table are added to the spell list of your Spellcasting class.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: Your Constitution score increases by 2, and your Wisdom score increases by 1.
